prompt:
A simple adhesive thermometer strip attached to the outside of a glass aquarium wall, shown in close-up as a plain dark rectangular strip with a few softly glowing color segments. The aquarium context is visible through the glass with blurred water, faint green plants, and a subtle waterline, but the strip itself is the main subject. Do not show any readable numbers, letters, symbols, brand marks, or printed scale details on the strip.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a calm near-future aquaria aesthetic: soft indoor lighting, realistic glass reflections, gentle water shimmer, clean composition, and muted natural colors. Keep the image minimal and icon-friendly, with no text anywhere in the frame, no labels, no packaging, and no identifiable people.
